DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS ALKA AGRAWAL AND RAVIN AGRAWAL'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTEROGATORIES AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. ORDER SIGNED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED, PLAINTIFF LINDSAY DUFFY-SMYTH IS ORDERED TO SERVE FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO DEFENDANTS' THIRD SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES BY DATE OF APRIL 9, 2012. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PARTIES STIPULATED MATTER TO BE DECIDED BY JUDGE PRO TEM. REBECCA WOODSON JUDGE PRO TEM, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SARA M. PETERS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF WALKUP, MELODIA & SCHOENBERGER, TEL. NO. 981-7210 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CASSANDRA M. ANGEL, TEL. NO. 288-6618 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANTS ALKA AGRAWAL AND RAVIN AGRAWAL'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions - MOTION TO COMPEL TO FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES SIPULATED TO THE FORM OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Not reported =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Continued To Apr-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS ALKA AGRAWAL AND RAVIN AGRAWAL'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions.
Continued to April 9, 2012 per agreement of parties. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, not reported.

Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Interoggs And To Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Philip C. Snell of Law Office of Fish & Snell (415-382-0100) appearing for plaintiff.
Atty. Kevin J. Gray of Harrington, Foxx, Dubrow & Canter, LLP (415-288-6600) appearing for defendant.

Argued - DEFENDANTS ALKA AGRAWAL AND RAVIN AGRAWAL'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interogatories And To Impose Monetary Sanctions is taken under submission. Order signed, defendant's motion is granted, plaintiff Lindsay Duffy-Smyth is ordered to serve further verified responses, without objections, to defendants' third Set of Special interrogatories by date of April 9, 2012. Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. Parties stipulated matter to be decided by Judge Pro Tem. Rebecca Woodson Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)
